# MissionChief Map Command Toolkit v5.0.7 — release evidence

Product issue: #470  
Release pull request: #473  
Canonical source SHA-256: `97a71c7df20a9d896872e554b671f789c74069f2ec8a1dbb8f4afd7135c303da`

## Validated invariants

- The command launcher is restricted to the top-level MissionChief document and primary map surface.
- The command-bar open or collapsed state is committed before UI reconciliation and is reapplied deterministically.
- Operational Requirements can recover mission-scoped native, grouped, compatible raw-HTML and bounded same-origin mission evidence.
- Visible equivalent LSSM requirement surfaces continue to suppress the Toolkit duplicate.
- Unknown or unavailable requirement evidence remains non-green until positive parsed coverage exists.
- Source, root distribution files, checksums and the release manifest remain synchronized.

## Deterministic coverage

- Issue #470 menu and requirements runtime fixture.
- Boot lifecycle, immediate coordinator retry and bounded map-fallback fixture.
- Settings UI route and Mission Age effect fixture.
- Canonical validation, JavaScript syntax and distribution parity.
- Static analysis, ESLint, structural, documentation, asset and performance gates.

This record is intentionally committed with the final candidate so the release decision can be audited without relying on transient workflow artifacts.
